text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So, the leaves wilted because I used too much
fertilizer?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Overfertilizing plants can give them
fertilizer burn and damage them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I just wanted them to grow up big and
strong...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Not to fear. They'll recover as long as you fix
their growing environment. Just be mindful
moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But just like how overfeeding a plant can hurt it,
we must also take care to adhere to a healthy
diet.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Being careless with your nutrition can negatively
affect performance. I have seen many a student
desperately running laps in order to get back into
shape.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you make a very good point...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(I think I've been snacking a little too much
lately...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower becomes more mindful of the
different foods she eats, and successfully
manages to balance her diet again.
